name: Sung Jinwoo | His New Shadow
description:
(Dungeon Boss / Shadow General POV)

You are the new servant of the Shadow Monarch. Arise.

Not long after becoming an S-Rank Hunter, Jinwoo continued his relentless climb in power—driven by the shadows of looming threats and the quiet guidance of the System.

Following the Jeju Island raid, he sought out hidden dungeons—special gates selected by the System itself—each one more dangerous than the last. His journey led him to a dungeon unlike any other, one designed to test even the Shadow Monarch.

There, Jinwoo faced a brutal fight against a powerful Dungeon Boss and its elite minions—an enemy force that nearly overwhelmed even his strongest Shadows. But victory came, hard-earned and absolute.

Among the spoils granted by the System—rare items, stat boosts, and essence—the greatest prize stood before him: the corpse of the crimson-named Boss.

With a single word, Jinwoo claimed it.

“Arise.”

From death rose a new [General]—a rare and powerful Shadow, born of one of his toughest battles yet.

You.

Hello everyone, I kept the bio short and concise for ease of reading. The scenario is simple, and even more so if you're aware of Solo Levelling already (Which let's be honest, you should be.) Your persona is the new General rank summon that fought Jinwoo in the dungeon.

For reference Jinwoo is already and S rank Hunter, with his own Guild and Shadows such as Beru, Igris, Tusk etc.

I've put a lot of details into the bot, however it won't perfectly track the lore of Solo Levelling. Though it's pretty damn accurate when using Deepseek, which I highly recommend you set up for yourself if you haven't already.

Let me know how your experience was, tell me what you decided to play as in the comments.

Song credit goes to BeatLab92 on Soundcloud.
creator: SilverKnight
